ARAW.forEach(function(d){if(d.responsavel&&!seen[d.responsavel]){seen[d.responsavel]=1;rs.push(d.responsavel);}}); rs.sort(function(a,b){return a==='(Todos)'?-1:b==='(Todos)'?1:a.localeCompare(b,'pt');}); document.getElementById('a-resp').innerHTML=rs.map(function(r){return '';}).join(''); } var aSF='all',aTV='tabela'; function aRefDate(){var v=document.getElementById('a-refdate').value;return v?new Date(v):new Date();} function aIsLate(d){ if(!d.prazo||d.status==='Realizado'||d.status==='Cancelado')return false; return new Date(d.prazo+'T00:00:00')dT)return false; if(q){var h=(d.acao+' '+d.objetivo+' '+d.indicador+' '+d.responsavel+' '+(d.obs||'')).toLowerCase();if(!h.includes(q))return false;} return true; }); } function aStatus(val,btn){ aSF=val; document.getElementById('a-spills').querySelectorAll('.pill').forEach(function(p){p.classList.remove('on');}); btn.classList.add('on'); aRender(); } function aTab(tab,btn){ aTV=tab; document.querySelectorAll('.astab').forEach(function(b){b.classList.remove('active');}); btn.classList.add('active'); document.getElementById('a-tabela').style.display=tab==='tabela'?'block':'none'; document.getElementById('a-indicadores').style.display=tab==='indicadores'?'block':'none'; aRender(); } function aReset(){ document.getElementById('a-search').value=''; document.getElementById('a-persp').value='all'; document.getElementById('a-resp').value='(Todos)'; document.getElementById('a-from').value=''; document.getElementById('a-to').value=''; aSF='all'; document.getElementById('a-spills').querySelectorAll('.pill').forEach(function(p,i){if(i===0)p.classList.add('on');else p.classList.remove('on');}); aRender(); } function ahl(txt,q){ if(!q||!txt)return String(txt||''); var re=new RegExp('('+q.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g,'\\$&')+')','gi'); return String(txt).replace(re,'$1'); } function aStC(d){if(aIsLate(d))return 'ps-atr';return{'Em Andamento':'ps-and','Aberto':'ps-ab','Realizado':'ps-rl','Cancelado':'ps-ca'}[d.status]||'ps-ab';} function aStL(d){if(aIsLate(d))return '⚠️ Atrasada';return d.status;} function aRender(){ var data=aGetData(); var q=(document.getElementById('a-search').value||'').toLowerCase(); var atr=ARAW.filter(function(d){return aIsLate(d);}).length; document.getElementById('a-atr-cnt').textContent=atr; document.getElementById('a-atr-box').style.display=atr>0?'flex':'none'; document.getElementById('a-res-n').textContent=data.length; document.getElementById('ms-and').textContent=data.filter(function(d){return d.status==='Em Andamento';}).length; document.getElementById('ms-ab').textContent=data.filter(function(d){return d.status==='Aberto';}).length; document.getElementById('ms-rl').textContent=data.filter(function(d){return d.status==='Realizado';}).length; document.getElementById('ms-atr').textContent=data.filter(function(d){return aIsLate(d);}).length; document.getElementById('tc-tab').textContent=data.length; var seenI={},ni=0; data.forEach(function(d){if(d.indicador&&!seenI[d.indicador]){seenI[d.indicador]=1;ni++;}}); document.getElementById('tc-ind').textContent=ni+' ind.'; if(aTV==='tabela')aRenderTab(data,q); else aRenderInd(data,q); _applyAZoom(); } function aRenderTab(data,q){ var el=document.getElementById('a-tabela'); if(!data.length){el.innerHTML='

';return;} var totAnd=data.filter(function(d){return d.status==='Em Andamento';}).length; var totAb=data.filter(function(d){return d.status==='Aberto';}).length; var totRl=data.filter(function(d){return d.status==='Realizado';}).length; var totCa=data.filter(function(d){return d.status==='Cancelado';}).length; var totAtr=data.filter(function(d){return aIsLate(d);}).length; var t=data.length||1; /* Top summary */ var topBar='

'+ '

'; } function mkRow(lbl,cnt,atr,rl,gt){ var pct=gt?Math.round(rl/gt*100):0; return '

'+ '
'; } var byResp={}; data.forEach(function(d){var k=d.responsavel||'N/A';if(!byResp[k])byResp[k]={cnt:0,rl:0,atr:0};byResp[k].cnt++;if(d.status==='Realizado')byResp[k].rl++;if(aIsLate(d))byResp[k].atr++;}); var respH=Object.entries(byResp).sort(function(a,b){return b[1].cnt-a[1].cnt;}) .map(function(e){return mkRow(e[0],e[1].cnt,e[1].atr,e[1].rl,e[1].cnt);}).join(''); var byIndA={}; data.forEach(function(d){ var k=d.indicador||'(sem indicador)'; if(!byIndA[k])byIndA[k]={cnt:0,rl:0,atr:0}; byIndA[k].cnt++;if(d.status==='Realizado')byIndA[k].rl++;if(aIsLate(d))byIndA[k].atr++; }); var indAH=Object.entries(byIndA).sort(function(a,b){return b[1].cnt-a[1].cnt;}).slice(0,12) .map(function(e){var lbl=e[0].length>22?e[0].substring(0,22)+'…':e[0];return mkRow(lbl,e[1].cnt,e[1].atr,e[1].rl,e[1].cnt);}).join(''); var byPersp={FIN:{cnt:0,rl:0,atr:0},CLI:{cnt:0,rl:0,atr:0},PROC:{cnt:0,rl:0,atr:0},APC:{cnt:0,rl:0,atr:0}}; data.forEach(function(d){var p=byPersp[d.perspectiva];if(p){p.cnt++;if(d.status==='Realizado')p.rl++;if(aIsLate(d))p.atr++;}}); var perspH=Object.entries(byPersp).filter(function(e){return e[1].cnt>0;}).map(function(e){ var pct=e[1].cnt?Math.round(e[1].rl/e[1].cnt*100):0; return '
'+ ''+e[0]+''+ (e[1].atr>0?'▲'+e[1].atr+'':'')+ ''+e[1].cnt+''+ ''+pct+'%'+ '
'+ '
'; }).join(''); var byObj={}; data.forEach(function(d){var k=d.objetivo||'Sem objetivo';if(!byObj[k])byObj[k]={cnt:0,rl:0,atr:0};byObj[k].cnt++;if(d.status==='Realizado')byObj[k].rl++;if(aIsLate(d))byObj[k].atr++;}); var objH=Object.entries(byObj).sort(function(a,b){return b[1].cnt-a[1].cnt;}).slice(0,10) .map(function(e){var lbl=e[0].length>24?e[0].substring(0,24)+'…':e[0];return mkRow(lbl,e[1].cnt,e[1].atr,e[1].rl,e[1].cnt);}).join(''); var analytics='
'+ mkPanel('Por Responsável','#3b82f6',respH)+ mkPanel('Por Indicador','#10b981',indAH)+ mkPanel('Por Perspectiva','var(--accent)',perspH)+ mkPanel('Por Objetivo','#a855f7',objH)+'
'; /* Expandable indicator cards */ var byInd={}; data.forEach(function(d){ var k=d.indicador||'(sem indicador)'; if(!byInd[k])byInd[k]={indicador:k,persp:d.perspectiva,objetivo:d.objetivo,acoes:[]}; byInd[k].acoes.push(d); }); var sorted=Object.values(byInd).sort(function(a,b){return b.acoes.length-a.acoes.length;}); var pGroups={}; sorted.forEach(function(g){if(!pGroups[g.persp])pGroups[g.persp]=[];pGroups[g.persp].push(g);}); var pO=['FIN','CLI','PROC','APC'],pL={FIN:'Financeira',CLI:'Clientes',PROC:'Processos',APC:'Aprendizagem & Crescimento'}; var sections=pO.filter(function(p){return pGroups[p];}).map(function(p){ return '
'+ ''+p+''+pL[p]+''+ ''+pGroups[p].length+' indicadores
'+ pGroups[p].map(function(g,gi){ var and=g.acoes.filter(function(d){return d.status==='Em Andamento';}).length; var ab=g.acoes.filter(function(d){return d.status==='Aberto';}).length; var rl=g.acoes.filter(function(d){return d.status==='Realizado';}).length; var atr=g.acoes.filter(function(d){return aIsLate(d);}).length; var im=IRAW.find(function(ir){return ir.indicador===g.indicador;}); var iStat=im?(''+(im.sv==='ok'?'✅ No alvo':im.sv==='blue'?'🔵 Quase':im.sv==='warn'?'⚠️ Atenção':im.sv==='orange'?'🔴 Abaixo':im.sv==='bad'?'❌ Crítico':'— S/dados')+''):''; var cid='ai-'+p+'-'+gi; var dRows=g.acoes.map(function(d){ var prazo=d.prazo?d.prazo.split('-').reverse().join('/'):'—'; return ''+ ''+ahl(d.acao,q)+''+ ''+ahl(d.responsavel,q)+''+ ''+prazo+''+ ''+aStL(d)+''+ ''+ahl(d.obs||'—',q)+''+ ''; }).join(''); return '

'; } function toggleCard(id){ var card=document.getElementById(id),body=document.getElementById(id+'-body'); if(!card||!body)return; var open=body.classList.toggle('open'); card.classList.toggle('expanded',open); } /* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ ATUALIZAÇÃO DE DADOS — lê .xlsx e regera IRAW + ARAW ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */ // Mapeamento: aba → departamento var UPD_SHEETS = { 'Comercial-Bruno':'Bruno','Comercial-Maycon':'Maycon', 'Comercial':'Comercial','Logística':'Logística', 'Produção':'Produção','Adm-Fin':'Adm-Fin' }; // Colunas dos meses (0-indexed): Jan-Dez // Cada mês tem 3 colunas: meta, real, ratio → usamos meta e real // Grupos: [7,8,9] Jan-Mar, [11,12,13] Abr-Jun, [15,16,17] Jul-Set, [19,20,21] Out-Dez // meta = col[0] de cada grupo, real = col[1] var UPD_META_COLS = [7,8,9,11,12,13,15,16,17,19,20,21]; // mesmo índice = meta var UPD_REAL_COLS = [8,9,10,12,13,14,16,17,18,20,21,22]; // +1 = real // Na verdade a estrutura é: meta_row, real_row, ratio_row // Colunas por mês (0-indexed): H=7,I=8,J=9 | L=11,M=12,N=13 | P=15,Q=16,R=17 | T=19,U=20,V=21 var UPD_MONTH_COLS = [7,8,9,11,12,13,15,16,17,19,20,21]; var UPD_PERSP_MAP = { 'Perspectiva Financeira':'FIN','Perspectiva Clientes':'CLI', 'Perspectiva Processos':'PROC','Perspectiva Aprendizagem':'APC', 'Financeira':'FIN','Clientes':'CLI','Processos':'PROC','Aprendizagem':'APC' }; var _updParsed = null; // dados parseados aguardando confirmação // ─── CONFIG_INDICADORES — lida ao importar Excel ────────────────────────── var IND_CONFIG = {}; function updApplyConfig(wb){ try{ var ws = wb.Sheets['Config_Indicadores']; if(!ws) return false; var refStr = ws['!ref']; if(!refStr) return false; var range = XLSX.utils.decode_range(refStr); if(!range || !range.e) return false; IND_CONFIG = {}; // Ler cada linha de indicador (linha 5 em diante, idx 4+) for(var ri = 4; ri <= range.e.r; ri++){ var indCell = ws[XLSX.utils.encode_cell({r:ri, c:1})]; // col B if(!indCell || !indCell.v) continue; var ind = String(indCell.v).trim(); if(ind.length < 2) continue; var fmtCell = ws[XLSX.utils.encode_cell({r:ri, c:2})]; // C var decCell = ws[XLSX.utils.encode_cell({r:ri, c:3})]; // D var unitCell = ws[XLSX.utils.encode_cell({r:ri, c:4})]; // E var menorCell= ws[XLSX.utils.encode_cell({r:ri, c:5})]; // F - "Menor e Melhor?" var tetoCell = ws[XLSX.utils.encode_cell({r:ri, c:6})]; // G var menorSim = menorCell ? String(menorCell.v||'').trim().toLowerCase() === 'sim' : false; var isTeto = tetoCell ? String(tetoCell.v ||'').indexOf('Teto') >= 0 : false; IND_CONFIG[ind] = { fmt : fmtCell ? String(fmtCell.v ||'').trim() : '%', dec : decCell ? (parseInt(decCell.v)||0) : 2, unit : unitCell ? String(unitCell.v||'').trim() : '', teto : isTeto, inverted : menorSim || isTeto }; } console.log('[CONFIG] ' + Object.keys(IND_CONFIG).length + ' indicadores lidos.'); return true; }catch(e){ console.warn('[CONFIG] ignorado:', e.message); IND_CONFIG = {}; return false; } } function updLoad(input){ var file=input.files[0]; if(!file)return; document.getElementById('upd-filename').textContent='[xlsx] '+file.name; var reader=new FileReader(); reader.onload=function(e){ try{ var wb=XLSX.read(e.target.result,{type:'array',cellFormula:true,cellNF:false,cellHTML:false,cellComment:true}); try{ updApplyConfig(wb); }catch(_ce){ IND_CONFIG={}; } var result=updParse(wb); _updParsed=result; updShowPreview(result); var m=document.getElementById('upd-modal'); m.style.display='flex'; }catch(err){ alert('Erro ao ler o arquivo:\n'+err.message); } input.value=''; }; reader.readAsArrayBuffer(file); } function updCancel(){ document.getElementById('upd-modal').style.display='none'; _updParsed=null; } function updConfirm(){ if(!_updParsed)return; // ── Mesclar com IRAW existente: preservar inverted, ind_notes e notas mensais ── // Indexar IRAW atual por nome de indicador para lookup rápido var _existingMap={}; IRAW.forEach(function(d){ _existingMap[d.indicador.trim().toLowerCase()]=d; }); _updParsed.iraw.forEach(function(d){ var key=d.indicador.trim().toLowerCase(); var existing=_existingMap[key]; // 1) Polaridade: fonte autoritativa = Config_Indicadores col F ("Menor e Melhor?") // Se o IND_CONFIG tem o indicador, usa seu inverted — sobrepõe qualquer detecção por fórmula. // Fallback: valor detectado pela fórmula do upload. Nunca restaura o IRAW antigo. var _cfgKey = d.indicador.trim(); if(IND_CONFIG[_cfgKey] && typeof IND_CONFIG[_cfgKey].inverted === 'boolean'){ d.inverted = IND_CONFIG[_cfgKey].inverted; } // 2) Comentários mensais: mesclar — manter existentes nos meses sem dados novos if(existing && existing.notes){ if(!d.notes) d.notes=Array(12).fill(null); d.notes=d.notes.map(function(n,i){ // Se o upload leu algo, usar. Senão, manter o existente. return (n && (Array.isArray(n) ? n.length>0 : n)) ? n : (existing.notes[i]||null); }); } // 3) Notas gerais do indicador if(existing && existing.ind_notes && (!d.ind_notes || !d.ind_notes.length)){ d.ind_notes = existing.ind_notes; } // Recalcular ratio com polaridade correta d.ratio=d.meta.map(function(mv,i){ var rv=d.real[i]; if(mv===null||rv===null||mv===0)return null; return d.inverted?mv/rv:rv/mv; }); var nz=d.ratio.filter(function(v){return v!==null;}); d.lrv=nz.length?nz[nz.length-1]:null; d.sv=updSt(d.lrv,d.indicador); if(!d.notes)d.notes=Array(12).fill(null); if(!d.ind_notes)d.ind_notes=[]; }); // Debug: log first 3 items console.log('[UPD] IRAW sample:', JSON.stringify(_updParsed.iraw.slice(0,3).map(function(d){ return {dept:d.dept,persp:d.persp,ind:d.indicador,sv:d.sv,lrv:d.lrv,meta0:d.meta[0],real0:d.real[0]}; }))); console.log('[UPD] IRAW length:', _updParsed.iraw.length, 'ARAW length:', _updParsed.araw.length); // Replace globals IRAW.length=0; _updParsed.iraw.forEach(function(d){IRAW.push(d);}); ARAW.length=0; _updParsed.araw.forEach(function(d){ARAW.push(d);}); console.log('[UPD] After assign — IRAW.length:', IRAW.length); // Reset filters iDeptF='Todos';iPerspF='all';iStatF='all';iIndSel=null;iComDados=false; var si=document.getElementById('ind-search');if(si)si.value=''; aInitResp(); iBuildChecklist(); iRender(); aRender(); document.getElementById('upd-modal').style.display='none'; _updParsed=null; setUpdTs(new Date()); // Salvar dados em localStorage (não precisa baixar novo HTML) updSaveLocal(); updToast('✅ Dashboard atualizado! Dados salvos neste navegador.'); } var _LS_IRAW='tm2026_iraw'; var _LS_ARAW='tm2026_araw'; function updSaveLocal(){ try{ localStorage.setItem(_LS_IRAW, JSON.stringify(IRAW)); localStorage.setItem(_LS_ARAW, JSON.stringify(ARAW)); }catch(e){ console.warn('[SAVE] localStorage falhou — tentando download HTML...',e); updSaveHtml(); } } function updLoadLocal(){ try{ var ri=localStorage.getItem(_LS_IRAW); var ra=localStorage.getItem(_LS_ARAW); if(ri&&ra){ var pi=JSON.parse(ri), pa=JSON.parse(ra); if(pi.length&&pa.length){ IRAW.length=0; pi.forEach(function(d){ if(!d.notes)d.notes=Array(12).fill(null); if(!d.ind_notes)d.ind_notes=[]; IRAW.push(d); }); ARAW.length=0; pa.forEach(function(d){ARAW.push(d);}); aInitResp(); iBuildChecklist(); iRender(); aRender(); console.log('[RESTORE] Dados restaurados do localStorage — IRAW:',IRAW.length,'ARAW:',ARAW.length); return true; } } }catch(e){console.warn('[RESTORE] Erro ao restaurar:',e);} return false; } function updClearLocal(){ try{localStorage.removeItem(_LS_IRAW);localStorage.removeItem(_LS_ARAW);}catch(e){} updToast('🗑️ Dados locais removidos — usando base original do arquivo.'); } function updSaveHtml(){ try{ var src=document.documentElement.outerHTML; var newIraw=JSON.stringify(IRAW); var newAraw=JSON.stringify(ARAW); // Replace var IRAW=[...]; — match from var IRAW=[ to the first ]; after it src=src.replace(/var IRAW=\[[\s\S]*?\];/,'var IRAW='+newIraw+';'); // Replace var ARAW=[...]; src=src.replace(/var ARAW=\[[\s\S]*?\];/,'var ARAW='+newAraw+';'); var blob=new Blob([src],{type:'text/html;charset=utf-8'}); var url=URL.createObjectURL(blob); var a=document.createElement('a'); var d=new Date(); var mm=d.getMonth()+1;var dd=d.getDate(); var stamp=d.getFullYear()+'-'+(mm<10?'0':'')+mm+'-'+(dd<10?'0':'')+dd; a.href=url; a.download='pe_tradicao_minas_2026_'+stamp+'.html'; document.body.appendChild(a); a.click(); setTimeout(function(){URL.revokeObjectURL(url);a.remove();},2000); }catch(e){ console.error('[SAVE] Erro ao salvar HTML:',e); } } function updToast(msg){ var t=document.createElement('div'); t.textContent=msg; t.style.cssText='position:fixed;bottom:24px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);'+ 'background:#22c55e;color:#fff;padding:10px 22px;border-radius:10px;font-family:Sora,sans-serif;'+ 'font-size:13px;font-weight:600;z-index:99999;box-shadow:0 4px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.25);'; document.body.appendChild(t); setTimeout(function(){t.remove();},3000); } function updSt(r,indicador){ if(indicador&&isCeiling(indicador)){ if(r===null||r===undefined)return'nd'; if(r>=1.0)return'ok'; if(r>=0.9501)return'blue'; if(r>=0.9001)return'warn'; if(r>=0)return'orange'; return'bad'; } if(r===null||r===undefined)return'nd'; if(r>=1.0)return'ok'; if(r>=0.9501)return'blue'; if(r>=0.9001)return'warn'; if(r>=0)return'orange'; return'bad'; } function updClean(v){ if(v===null||v===undefined||v==='')return null; var f=parseFloat(v); return isNaN(f)?null:f; } function updShowPreview(result){ console.log('[UPD] Parse result — iraw:', result.iraw.length, 'araw:', result.araw.length, 'errors:', result.errors); if(result.iraw.length>0)console.log('[UPD] First indicator:', JSON.stringify({dept:result.iraw[0].dept,persp:result.iraw[0].persp,ind:result.iraw[0].indicador,meta:result.iraw[0].meta[0],real:result.iraw[0].real[0],ratio:result.iraw[0].ratio[0]})); var errs=result.errors; var html=''+result.iraw.length+' indicadores lidos  ·  '+result.araw.length+' ações lidas
'; // Count by dept var dc={}; result.iraw.forEach(function(d){dc[d.dept]=(dc[d.dept]||0)+1;}); Object.keys(dc).forEach(function(k){html+=''+k+': '+dc[k]+'   ';}); // Count inverted var inv=result.iraw.filter(function(d){return d.inverted;}).length; html+='
Invertidos (menor=melhor): '+inv; // Count with data var withData=result.iraw.filter(function(d){return d.real.some(function(v){return v!==null;});}).length; html+=' · Com dados: '+withData; // Count annotations var notesCount=0; result.iraw.forEach(function(d){if(d.notes)d.notes.forEach(function(n){if(n)notesCount++;});}); if(notesCount>0){html+=' · 📝 Anotações: '+notesCount+'';} document.getElementById('upd-preview').innerHTML=html; var errEl=document.getElementById('upd-errs'); if(errs.length){ errEl.style.display='block'; errEl.innerHTML='⚠️ '+errs.length+' avisos:
'+errs.slice(0,10).join('
'); } else { errEl.style.display='none'; } } function updParse(wb){ var iraw=[], araw=[], errors=[]; // 12 meses: H,I,J | L,M,N | P,Q,R | T,U,V (0-indexed) var MCOLS=[7,8,9,11,12,13,15,16,17,19,20,21]; Object.keys(UPD_SHEETS).forEach(function(shname){ var dept=UPD_SHEETS[shname]; var ws=wb.Sheets[shname]; if(!ws){errors.push('Aba não encontrada: '+shname);return;} var ref=ws['!ref']||'A1:Z1'; var range=XLSX.utils.decode_range(ref); var maxRow=range.e.r; var curPersp='FIN', curObj=''; for(var ri=0;ri<=maxRow;ri++){ // Detectar perspectiva (col A=0 ou B=1) [0,1].forEach(function(ci){ var v=updCell(ws,ri,ci); if(!v)return; var s=String(v); Object.keys(UPD_PERSP_MAP).forEach(function(k){ if(s.indexOf(k)>=0)curPersp=UPD_PERSP_MAP[k]; }); }); // Detectar objetivo: col B tem fórmula =Perspectivas!... var cbRaw=updCellRaw(ws,ri,1); if(cbRaw&&typeof cbRaw.f==='string'&&cbRaw.f.indexOf('Perspectivas')>=0){ var cc=updCell(ws,ri,2); if(cc)curObj=String(cc); } // Linha de indicador: col G (idx 6) = 'Meta' var cg=updCell(ws,ri,6); if(String(cg)!=='Meta')continue; // Nome do indicador está na col C (idx 2) desta mesma linha var indName=updCell(ws,ri,2); if(!indName||String(indName).trim().length<3)continue; var metaRi=ri; // G='Meta' var realRi=ri+1; // G='Realizado' var ratioRi=ri+2; // G='Resultado' if(ratioRi>maxRow)continue; // Detectar polaridade pela fórmula da linha Resultado, col H (idx 7) var ratioCell=updCellRaw(ws,ratioRi,7); var inverted=false; var _invertedFromFormula=false; if(ratioCell&&typeof ratioCell.f==='string'){ var m=ratioCell.f.match(/[A-Z](\d+)\/[A-Z](\d+)/g); if(m&&m.length){ var parts=m[m.length-1].match(/(\d+)\/(\d+)/); if(parts){var a=parseInt(parts[1]),b=parseInt(parts[2]);inverted=(a1000){ // é um serial de data válido var d=XLSX.SSF.parse_date_code(n); if(d){ var mm=String(d.m).padStart(2,'0'); var dd=String(d.d).padStart(2,'0'); return d.y+'-'+mm+'-'+dd; } } } // Fallback: tentar como string var parsed=new Date(String(v)); return isNaN(parsed.getTime())?'':parsed.toISOString().split('T')[0]; } for(var ai=4;ai<=Math.max(acMaxRow,400);ai++){ // ri=4 = linha 5 do Excel; varre até 400 ignorando vazios var vA=updCell(acSheet,ai,0); // Perspectiva var vB=updCell(acSheet,ai,1); // Objetivo var vC=updCell(acSheet,ai,2); // Indicador var vD=updCell(acSheet,ai,3); // Ações var vE=updCellRaw(acSheet,ai,4); // Data Início (raw para pegar serial) var vF=updCell(acSheet,ai,5); // Responsável var vG=updCellRaw(acSheet,ai,6); // Prazo (raw para pegar serial) var vH=updCell(acSheet,ai,7); // Status var vI=updCell(acSheet,ai,8); // Observação var vJ=updCell(acSheet,ai,9); // Observação2 if(!vD||String(vD).trim()==='')continue; // linha vazia // Extrair valor da célula raw (pode ser .v = valor, .w = formatted) function cellVal(c){return c?(c.v!==undefined?c.v:null):null;} // Normalizar status var rawStatus=vH?String(vH).trim():''; var status='Aberto'; if(/realizado/i.test(rawStatus))status='Realizado'; else if(/andamento/i.test(rawStatus))status='Em Andamento'; else if(/cancelado/i.test(rawStatus))status='Cancelado'; else if(/aberto/i.test(rawStatus))status='Aberto'; // Concatenar obs1 + obs2 var obs1=vI?String(vI).trim():''; var obs2=vJ?String(vJ).trim():''; var obs=obs1&&obs2?obs1+' / '+obs2:(obs1||obs2); araw.push({ perspectiva:vA?String(vA).trim():'', objetivo:vB?String(vB).trim():'', indicador:vC?String(vC).trim():'', acao:String(vD).trim(), dt_inicio:fmtDate(cellVal(vE)), responsavel:vF?String(vF).trim():'', prazo:fmtDate(cellVal(vG)), status:status, obs:obs }); } if(araw.length===0){ errors.push('Nenhuma ação lida — mantendo dados anteriores'); araw=ARAW.slice(); } } return {iraw:iraw, araw:araw, errors:errors}; } function updCell(ws,row,col){ var addr=XLSX.utils.encode_cell({r:row,c:col}); var cell=ws[addr]; if(!cell)return null; return cell.v!==undefined?cell.v:null; } // Helper: get raw cell object (for formula access) function updCellRaw(ws,row,col){ var addr=XLSX.utils.encode_cell({r:row,c:col}); return ws[addr]||null; } /* ── Timestamp de última atualização ───────────────────── */ var _UPD_TS_KEY='tm2026_upd_ts'; function _fmtTs(d){ var p=function(n){return String(n).padStart(2,'0');}; return p(d.getDate())+'/'+p(d.getMonth()+1)+'/'+d.getFullYear()+ ' '+p(d.getHours())+':'+p(d.getMinutes())+':'+p(d.getSeconds()); } function _applyTs(ts){ var el=document.getElementById('hdr-ts'); if(el) el.textContent=ts; var bar=document.getElementById('upd-ts'); var val=document.getElementById('upd-ts-val'); if(bar) bar.style.display='flex'; if(val) val.textContent=ts; var pft=document.getElementById('print-footer-ts'); if(pft) pft.textContent=ts?'⏰ Atualizado: '+ts:''; } function loadUpdTs(){ var ts=''; try{ts=localStorage.getItem(_UPD_TS_KEY)||'';}catch(e){} if(ts) _applyTs(ts); } function setUpdTs(d){ var ts=_fmtTs(d); try{localStorage.setItem(_UPD_TS_KEY,ts);}catch(e){} _applyTs(ts); } /* ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ /* ── Abas do modal ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ function modTab(tab,btn){ document.querySelectorAll('.mod-tab').forEach(function(b){b.classList.remove('active');}); btn.classList.add('active'); var graf=document.getElementById('mod-panel-graf'); var acoes=document.getElementById('mod-panel-acoes'); if(tab==='graf'){if(graf)graf.style.display='block';if(acoes)acoes.style.display='none';} else{if(graf)graf.style.display='none';if(acoes)acoes.style.display='flex';} } function modRenderAcoes(indicador){ var ind=indicador.toLowerCase().trim(); var acoes=ARAW.filter(function(d){return d.indicador&&d.indicador.toLowerCase().trim()===ind;}); if(!acoes.length)acoes=ARAW.filter(function(d){return d.indicador&&(d.indicador.toLowerCase().indexOf(ind)>=0||ind.indexOf(d.indicador.toLowerCase().trim())>=0);}); var cnt=document.getElementById('mod-acoes-cnt');if(cnt)cnt.textContent=acoes.length; var el=document.getElementById('mod-acoes-content');if(!el)return; if(!acoes.length){el.innerHTML='
Nenhuma ação vinculada.
';return;} var nAnd=acoes.filter(function(d){return d.status==='Em Andamento'&&!aIsLate(d);}).length; var nAb=acoes.filter(function(d){return d.status==='Aberto'&&!aIsLate(d);}).length; var nRl=acoes.filter(function(d){return d.status==='Realizado';}).length; var nAtr=acoes.filter(function(d){return aIsLate(d);}).length; var nCa=acoes.filter(function(d){return d.status==='Cancelado';}).length; var pills=''; if(nAnd)pills+='
'+nAnd+' Em Andamento
'; if(nAb) pills+='
'+nAb+' Aberto
'; if(nAtr)pills+='
'+nAtr+' Atrasada'+(nAtr>1?'s':'')+'
'; if(nRl) pills+='
'+nRl+' Realizado
'; if(nCa) pills+='
'+nCa+' Cancelado
'; var prog='
'+ (nAnd?'
':'')+ (nAb?'
':'')+ (nAtr?'
':'')+ (nRl?'
':'')+ (nCa?'
':'')+ '
'; var rows=acoes.map(function(d){ var prazo=d.prazo?d.prazo.split('-').reverse().join('/'):'—'; var inicio=d.dt_inicio?d.dt_inicio.split('-').reverse().join('/'):'—'; var late=aIsLate(d); var sc={'Em Andamento':'ps-and','Aberto':'ps-ab','Realizado':'ps-rl','Cancelado':'ps-ca'}[d.status]||'ps-ab'; if(late)sc='ps-atr'; return ''+d.acao+''+ ''+d.responsavel+''+ ''+inicio+''+ ''+prazo+''+ ''+(late?'⚠️ Atrasada':d.status)+''+ ''+(d.obs||'—')+''; }).join(''); el.innerHTML='
'+pills+'
'+prog+ ''+rows+'
AçãoResponsávelInícioPrazoStatusObs.
'; } /* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ /* ── Maximizar modal ────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ var _modalMaximized = false; function toggleModalMax(){ var modal=document.querySelector('.modal'); var ov=document.getElementById('modal-overlay'); var btn=document.getElementById('mod-max-btn'); _modalMaximized=!_modalMaximized; modal.classList.toggle('maximized',_modalMaximized); ov.classList.toggle('maximized-ov',_modalMaximized); if(btn)btn.innerHTML=_modalMaximized?'⛶ Reduzir':'⛶ Expandir'; } /* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */ var _tblZoom={trim:100,anual:100}; function _applyTblZoom(view){ var el=document.getElementById(view==='trim'?'vw-trimestral':'vw-anual'); if(!el)return; var z=_tblZoom[view]/100; el.style.zoom=z; el.style.transform=''; el.style.width=''; el.style.marginBottom=''; } function tblZoom(view,delta){ if(delta===0)_tblZoom[view]=100; else _tblZoom[view]=Math.max(60,Math.min(200,_tblZoom[view]+delta)); document.getElementById(view+'-zoom-lbl').textContent=_tblZoom[view]+'%'; _applyTblZoom(view); } var _modAcoesZoom=100; function modAcoesZoom(delta){ if(delta===0)_modAcoesZoom=100; else _modAcoesZoom=Math.max(70,Math.min(160,_modAcoesZoom+delta)); var lbl=document.getElementById('mod-acoes-zlbl');if(lbl)lbl.textContent=_modAcoesZoom+'%'; var el=document.getElementById('mod-acoes-content');if(!el)return; var z=_modAcoesZoom/100; el.style.transformOrigin='top left'; el.style.transform='scale('+z+')'; el.style.width=(100/z)+'%'; } var _aZoom=100; function aZoom(delta){ if(delta===0)_aZoom=100; else _aZoom=Math.max(60,Math.min(200,_aZoom+delta)); var lbl=document.getElementById('a-zoom-lbl');if(lbl)lbl.textContent=_aZoom+'%'; _applyAZoom(); } function _applyAZoom(){ var el=document.getElementById('a-tabela');if(!el)return; var z=_aZoom/100; // zoom preserva sticky, transform:scale não el.style.zoom=z; el.style.transform=''; el.style.width=''; } var _cardZoom=100; function cardZoom(delta){ if(delta===0)_cardZoom=100; else _cardZoom=Math.max(50,Math.min(200,_cardZoom+delta)); var lbl=document.getElementById('card-zoom-lbl');if(lbl)lbl.textContent=_cardZoom+'%'; _applyCardZoom(); } function _applyCardZoom(){ var el=document.getElementById('vw-mensal');if(!el)return; var z=_cardZoom/100; el.style.zoom=z; } function printModalAcoes(){ var title=document.getElementById('mod-title').innerText; var obj=document.getElementById('mod-obj').innerText; var dp=document.getElementById('mod-dept-persp').innerHTML; var tbl=document.getElementById('mod-acoes-content'); if(!tbl||!tbl.innerHTML.trim())return; var orig=tbl.style.transform,origW=tbl.style.width; tbl.style.transform='';tbl.style.width='100%'; var win=window.open('','_print','width=980,height=800'); win.document.write('Ações — '+title+''+ ''+ ''); win.document.write('
'+dp+'

'+title+'

'+obj+'
'); win.document.write(tbl.innerHTML); tbl.style.transform=orig;tbl.style.width=origW; win.document.write(getPfHtml()+' '); win.document.close();win.focus(); setTimeout(function(){win.print();},600); } /* INIT */ // ── Colunas Redimensionáveis ────────────────────────────────────────────────── function makeResizable(table){ if(!table||table._resizable)return; table._resizable=true; var ths=table.querySelectorAll('thead th'); ths.forEach(function(th){ // Evita duplicar if(th.querySelector('.col-resizer'))return; var div=document.createElement('div'); div.className='col-resizer'; th.appendChild(div); var startX,startW; div.addEventListener('mousedown',function(e){ startX=e.pageX; startW=th.offsetWidth; div.classList.add('active'); var onMove=function(ev){ var w=startW+(ev.pageX-startX); if(w>30)th.style.width=w+'px'; }; var onUp=function(){ div.classList.remove('active'); document.removeEventListener('mousemove',onMove); document.removeEventListener('mouseup',onUp); }; document.addEventListener('mousemove',onMove); document.addEventListener('mouseup',onUp); e.preventDefault(); }); }); } // Apply resizable to all .dtbl tables after any render var _origIRenderTrim=iRenderTrim; iRenderTrim=function(data){_origIRenderTrim(data);setTimeout(function(){var t=document.querySelector('#vw-trimestral .dtbl');if(t)makeResizable(t);},50);}; var _origIRenderAnual=iRenderAnual; iRenderAnual=function(data){_origIRenderAnual(data);setTimeout(function(){var t=document.querySelector('#vw-anual .dtbl');if(t)makeResizable(t);},50);}; var _origARenderTab=aRenderTab; aRenderTab=function(data,q){_origARenderTab(data,q);setTimeout(function(){var t=document.querySelector('#a-tabela .acoes-tbl');if(t)makeResizable(t);},50);}; // ── File System Access API ──────────────────────────────────────────────────── var _fsapiHandle = null; function fsapiSupported(){ return ('showOpenFilePicker' in window); } function fsapiInit(){ if(!fsapiSupported()){ document.getElementById('btn-vincular').style.display='none'; return; } // Tentar restaurar handle salvo no localStorage fsapiRestoreHandle(); } async function fsapiVincular(){ if(!fsapiSupported()){ alert('Browser sem suporte. Use Chrome ou Edge.'); return; } try{ var handles = await window.showOpenFilePicker({ types:[{description:'Excel',accept:{'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.spreadsheetml.sheet':['.xlsx']}}], multiple:false }); _fsapiHandle = handles[0]; await fsapiSalvarHandle(_fsapiHandle); fsapiSetLinked(_fsapiHandle.name); await fsapiLerEProcessar(); }catch(e){ if(e.name!=='AbortError') alert('Erro ao vincular: '+e.message); } } async function fsapiAtualizar(){ if(!_fsapiHandle){ fsapiVincular(); return; } try{ var perm = await _fsapiHandle.queryPermission({mode:'read'}); if(perm !== 'granted'){ var req = await _fsapiHandle.requestPermission({mode:'read'}); if(req !== 'granted'){ alert('Permissao de leitura negada.'); return; } } await fsapiLerEProcessar(); }catch(e){ alert('Erro ao atualizar: '+e.message); } } async function fsapiLerEProcessar(){ try{ var file = await _fsapiHandle.getFile(); var buf = await file.arrayBuffer(); document.getElementById('upd-filename').textContent='[xlsx] '+file.name; var wb = XLSX.read(buf,{type:'array',cellFormula:true,cellNF:false,cellHTML:false,cellComment:true}); try{ updApplyConfig(wb); }catch(_ce){ IND_CONFIG={}; } var result = updParse(wb); _updParsed = result; updShowPreview(result); document.getElementById('upd-modal').style.display='flex'; }catch(e){ alert('Erro ao ler arquivo: '+e.message); } } function fsapiSetLinked(nome){ var btn = document.getElementById('btn-vincular'); var lbl = document.getElementById('btn-vincular-lbl'); var dot = document.getElementById('fsapi-dot'); var sync = document.getElementById('btn-sync'); if(nome){ btn.classList.add('linked'); dot.style.background='var(--ok)'; lbl.textContent = nome.length>18 ? nome.substring(0,16)+'…' : nome; btn.title = 'Vinculado: '+nome+' Clique para trocar'; sync.style.display='flex'; } else { btn.classList.remove('linked'); dot.style.background='currentColor'; lbl.textContent='Vincular Excel'; btn.title='Vincular arquivo Excel'; sync.style.display='none'; } } // Persistencia do handle via IndexedDB function fsapiSalvarHandle(handle){ return new Promise(function(resolve){ try{ var req = indexedDB.open('fsapi_db',1); req.onupgradeneeded = function(e){ e.target.result.createObjectStore('handles'); }; req.onsuccess = function(e){ var db = e.target.result; var tx = db.transaction('handles','readwrite'); tx.objectStore('handles').put(handle,'xlsxHandle'); tx.oncomplete = function(){ db.close(); resolve(); }; }; req.onerror = function(){ resolve(); }; }catch(e){ resolve(); } }); } function fsapiRestoreHandle(){ try{ var req = indexedDB.open('fsapi_db',1); req.onupgradeneeded = function(e){ e.target.result.createObjectStore('handles'); }; req.onsuccess = function(e){ var db = e.target.result; try{ var tx = db.transaction('handles','readonly'); var get = tx.objectStore('handles').get('xlsxHandle'); get.onsuccess = function(){ db.close(); if(get.result){ _fsapiHandle = get.result; fsapiSetLinked(_fsapiHandle.name); } }; get.onerror = function(){ db.close(); }; }catch(er){ db.close(); } }; req.onerror = function(){}; }catch(e){} } window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',function(){ document.getElementById('a-refdate').value=new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0]; loadUpdTs(); fsapiInit(); // Restaurar dados atualizados do localStorage (não precisa baixar novo HTML) if(!updLoadLocal()){ aInitResp(); iBuildChecklist(); iRender(); aRender(); } document.getElementById('panel-acoes').style.display='none'; });
